title: الكلمة والعكس
instruction_en: The word and its opposite — match each word with its antonym.
notes: Each PDF spread is a word↔opposite pair: green card (left) = word, pink card (right) = its opposite. 24 pairs across 24 page images, all read by sight. Pairs are stored word→opposite as the green-card term → pink-card term; the antonym relationship is symmetric, so order is presentational only. Page 19 (لَيل↔نَهار) rendered at smaller scale but text legible. Harakat (vowel marks) transcribed as shown; a few cards show partial/optional diacritics. مُبكي / مُضحك (p14) shown without full harakat on the card. Flag for the mother: confirm preferred standard vocalization for these adjectives, and whether يَنْزَل/يَصْعَد (verbs 'goes down'/'goes up') belong with the adjective opposites or in a separate verb set. signedOff:false.
